title: Rust lichen-node stack.rs: Removed local checksum functions but depends on UdpHeader
description: In rust/lichen-node/src/stack.rs, the local udp_checksum(), oc_add(), checksum_bytes(), pseudo_sum(), finalize() functions were removed in favor of using UdpHeader::write_to(). This is a good refactor that consolidates checksum logic. Verify that lichen-ipv6's UdpHeader::write_to() computes the checksum correctly (it delegates to checksum module). The consolidation is good for maintainability.
close_reason: Refactor verified correct - checksum logic consolidated in UdpHeader::write_to
